{{Quote|That was some act. Who ''needs'' an army when you've got a Jedi, right?|Kirry to "[[Pinky]]"|<ref name="Incident at Horn Station">{{Tales|2|Incident at Horn Station}}</ref>}}
'''Kirry''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] native to [[Horn Station]]. She once met a Human [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], "[[Pinky]]," who was on a mission to liberate the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] from [[Shoto Eyefire]]'s tyranny. Kirry harbored a romantic interest for the Jedi; since only a few Humans inhabited the planet, there never really were any potential companions of the same species. She never found out the Jedi's real name, however he swore to tell it to her the next time they would meet.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|2|Incident at Horn Station}} {{1st}}
